title: Ubiquiti USL-Siren, UniFi Protect wireless siren
description: The Ubiquiti USL-Siren is a wireless UniFi Protect siren with visual signaling (illuminated red ring). It communicates with the gateway using the proprietary SuperLink protocol with range of up to 2km (in open space). Thanks to its IP56 rating, it is suitable for both indoor and outdoor wall or ceiling installation. The siren is powered by (4) CR123A batteries (included) and reaches a sound level of up to 110dB . The device is also equipped with a 12-24V DC power input and a signal input
